name: Apple Pie -1
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pastry and line a 9-inch pie plate.
2. In a small saucepan, combine sugar and flour, stirring well.
3. Add milk to the sugar-flour mixture and stir until combined.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil while stirring continuously.
5. Reduce heat and simmer until slightly thickened.
6. In a bowl, beat egg yolks lightly.
7. Add a small amount of the hot liquid mixture to the beaten yolks.
8. Pour the egg yolk mixture into the saucepan.
9. Stir in margarine and vanilla.
10. Cool the filling.
11. Peel and slice the apples, then sprinkle with lemon juice.
12. In a skillet, melt margarine, sugar, and nutmeg over low heat.
13. Add apples to the skillet and sauté, stirring occasionally until just tender (about 5 minutes).
14. Remove from heat and distribute the apples evenly in the pastry-lined pie plate.
15. Pour the cooled apple filling into the pie shell.
16. Melt apricot preserves in a saucepan and spread evenly over the apple mixture.
17. Cover with additional pastry.
18. Beat egg yolk and water together and brush over the top of the pastry.
19. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 40 minutes or until golden brown.
